name: X-Force Risky URL
notes: This rule detects when a local user is accessing questionable online content.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
when the event matches URL (custom) is not N/A

when URL (custom) is categorized by X-Force as Alcohol, Anonymization Services, Botnet Command and Control Server, Computer Crime / Hacking, Erotic / Sex, Gambling / Lottery, Illegal Activities, Illegal Drugs, Malware, Phishing URLs, Political Extreme / Hate / Discrimination, Pornography, Sects, Violence / Extreme, Warez / Software Piracy, Weapons / Military
TD_list: APPLY X-Force Risky URL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
AND when the event matches URL (custom) is not N/A

AND when URL (custom) is categorized by X-Force as Alcohol, Anonymization Services, Botnet Command and Control Server, Computer Crime / Hacking, Erotic / Sex, Gambling / Lottery, Illegal Activities, Illegal Drugs, Malware, Phishing URLs, Political Extreme / Hate / Discrimination, Pornography, Sects, Violence / Extreme, Warez / Software Piracy, Weapons / Military
RED_list: Event description: A local user is accessing questionable online content.
